world.title: Loss and damage fund could run out of money next year
world.description: Unless there are more donations, the Fund for Responding to Loss and Damage could give out all its money by the end of 2027

world.title: How Curad-1 Will Revolutionize Energy Future of Somalia, Türkiye
world.description: Roughly 370 kilometers (230 miles) off Somalia’s central coast, between Xarardheere and Hobyo in Galmudug state of Somalia, the Turkish drillship Çağrı Bey has begun what is arguably the country’s most consequential energy experiment to date. The target, Curad-1, is the first test well within a trio of offshore blocks mapped using advanced 3D seismic surveys by the Turkish Petroleum Corporation.

world.title: Which 9 warships are accompanying USS Abraham Lincoln, Gerald R. Ford and H.W. George Bush in Middle East?
world.description: A third US aircraft carrier, the USS George H.W. Bush, has arrived in waters near Iran along with its escorting warships, significantly expanding American military presence in the region.

world.description: “He dreamed, like everyone, of living in a free country,” Valentina Shapyrko said of her son, Ukrainian soldier Pavlo Artemenko, who is imprisoned in Russia.

world.title: UK Palestine Action activist tells court sledgehammer attack on officer was 'reasonable'
world.description: In retrial over 2024 raid of Israeli defense firm's Bristol factory, defendant admits cop he targeted after hearing screams from fellow activist wasn't actually hurting anyone

world.title: From Planning to Action: Forest Landscape Restoration Implementation Momentum Builds Across Partner Countries
world.description: Madagascar, Uganda, and Peru have begun on-the-ground implementation of the FLR Hub initiative, marking a pivotal shift from planning to action in the global effort to restore degraded forest landscapes.
